response.overview: Yan Dan regains her memories and discovers that Ying Yuan is the one who wiped out her memories and turned her into a spirit, sending her to the Mortal Realm. Lord Ying Yuan, who took human form as Tang Zhou, only needs one more divine artifact to repair his celestial vessel and return to the Heavenly realm as the Sovereign Lord. Will he reveal the anonymous figure who backed the evil doings, and will he and Yan Dan overcome the misunderstandings between them?
response.title: 沉香重华
